text:
The God's Model automail is a highly expensive series of automail prosthetic known for the quality of their product. The God's Model automail line seems to resemble standard automail, with the exception of an ornate design on the upper arm. The automail also has a noticeable shine to it that seems to exceed that of standard automail.

Trivia

Winry's look upon seeing the Automail through a window at a shop in Rush Valley is that of utter exhilaration, stating she never thought the day would come when she would glance upon one with her own eyes, leading one to assume the Automail far exceeds the quality of Edward's own prosthetics.
